title: Econometrics
subject: Econometrics
learning_objectives: Derive and apply the properties of ordinary least squares (OLS) estimators under classical and non-classical assumptions
Construct and interpret hypothesis tests and confidence intervals for regression parameters
Apply instrumental variables and two-stage least squares to address endogeneity
Analyze panel data using fixed effects, random effects, and first-difference estimators
Apply maximum likelihood estimation and understand its large-sample properties
Use generalized method of moments (GMM) for estimation of structural models
Implement nonparametric and semiparametric regression methods
Evaluate causal inference strategies including difference-in-differences and regression discontinuity
Apply time series models including ARIMA, VAR, and cointegration methods
